description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GLideN64 that triggers on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has three jobs: Linux, Windows, and Release. The Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, installs necessary packages, and builds GLideN64 for x64 Mupen64Plus-CLI and x64 Mupen64Plus-Qt. The Windows job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, and builds GLideN64 for various Project64 and Mupen64Plus configurations. The Release job runs on ubuntu-latest, downloads artifacts from the Linux and Windows jobs, repackages them, and creates a release with the artifacts.
